channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Winning the Minerals Race Requires Building Demand, Not Just Supply
item.description: Minerals security is not just a supply challenge; it is a demand one. China built dominance by linking mines to manufacturing and driving demand through firms like BYD. The United States needs bold demand-side policy and real incentives to source from allies and unlock investment.
